algoActions: reply (every bettor has an opinion on 'should the top play be tweeted' — micro-commitment machine)
profile_click + follow (strangers audit the receipts; the debate implies tomorrow's answer)
dwell (fold ends after the two site-only wins)
hero.negativeSignalAudit: Self-deprecating about our own 2-2 feed; no gloating; the sell is one line framed as fact.
hero.continuity: Closes the noon-confession arc from 7/6; callback to Friday's Colombia max play; carries the week number forward without re-leading with it.
hero.screenshot: Graded July 6 full card — all seven results, the two site-only wins visible alongside the tweeted picks
hero.text:
I'm the weak link in my own operation.

Last night the system went 4-3, +5.7 units. The plays I personally picked to tweet went 2-2.

The ones I left sitting on the site:

Diamondbacks ML — the board's top-rated play ✅
Over 9.5 in Mets–Braves — a quiet 4 units ✅

I was too busy tweeting about Belgium.

+27 units in the last week, and it's mostly the machine's doing.

So, the debate: should the board's top-rated play auto-post here every morning? Because my record choosing tweets is now officially worse than the system's record choosing bets.

Convince me.
hero.rtLine: My record choosing tweets is officially worse than the system's record choosing bets.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: While you argue it out: today's card is already up. Argentina at noon, Colombia — Friday's max-play team — at 4. The first week is free. nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0707a
hero.postWindow: 8:00-9:30 AM ET — morning coffee scroll; Argentina noon game gives it a natural 3h runway
hero.version: v7 FINAL — human-vs-machine confession; research: niche virality = believable principle/authenticity, tout-format is the anti-pattern; engineered hooks (v6) rejected as unbelievable
hero.purpose: REACH (tweet) + CONVERT (self-reply) — heaviest-slot pattern: the thread sequences the jobs
hero.babysit: Reply to EVERY comment in the first 60 min; each reply naturally says 'it's on the site every morning' — the funnel conversation IS the babysitting
hero.hookRationale: Self-deprecation with receipts is the only hook class this account is BELIEVED on (ledger: confession = top structure). No tout opens by calling himself the problem — instant differentiation from the VIP-spam sea. The site-is-smarter-than-the-feed argument makes the funnel the punchline, not an ad.

gradePosts.argentinaWin:
Argentina handles it. ✅ 4 units at -285 isn't glamorous — it's just green.

Colombia +125 at 4 PM is the fun one. Same Colombia that cashed Friday's max.
gradePosts.argentinaLoss:
Argentina ML dies at noon and takes 4 units with it. Heavy favorites lose too — that's why the board sizes them, not us.

Colombia +125 at 4. The day isn't over.

Do not blame anything for the Belgium loss — the happy-L is the brand moment
Re-run socialBoard before the noon Argentina post window if quoting consensus numbers
